page.text: Master MV Marina: Coastguard Ostend, Coastguard Ostend, Coastguard Ostend. This is MV Marina, MV Marina, MV Marina. How do you read me? Over. Ostend Coastguard: MV Marina, MV Marina, MV Marina. This is Coastguard Ostend, Coastguard Ostend, Coastguard Ostend. I read you excellent. Go ahead with your message. Over. Master MV Marina: Coastguard Ostend. This is MV Marina. Located a vessel dumping waste in position 51 degrees 45 minutes North/003 degrees 12 minutes East at 1020 UTC. Repeat 51 degrees 45 minutes North/003 degrees 12 minutes East at 1020 UTC. Over. Ostend Coastguard: MV Marina. This is Coastguard Ostend. Can you identify the polluter? Over. Master MV Marina: Coastguard Ostend. This is MV Marina. Yes, I can identify the polluter. Polluter is MV Suzie. Over.

Ostend Coastguard: MV Marina. This is Coastguard Ostend. What is course and speed of the polluter? Over. Master MV Marina: Coastguard Ostend. This is MV Marina. Course of the polluter is 012 degrees, speed 10 knots. Over. Ostend Coastguard: MV Marina. This is Coastguard Ostend. ADVICE. Stay in vicinity of the polluter. I will send coastguard assistance. Over. Master MV Marina: Coastguard Ostend. This is MV Marina. Message understood. I will stay in vicinity of the polluter. Out.
